name: API热点网精选推荐
description: A GEOFlow frontend theme for API recommendation portals, with a full static-style recommendation homepage, dynamic latest-article section, and NetEase-derived list/detail page contracts.
notes: Homepage is derived from the local recommend static page and adapted into a GEOFlow Blade theme.
Default homepage shows the API recommendation modules plus the latest 10 published articles using the existing article paginator.
Search, category, article, archive, SEO meta, JSON-LD, route helpers, and article rendering contracts are preserved.
The original netease-news-20260507 theme is not modified.
